title: Installer diagnostics proof loop
acceptanceCriteria: Telegram diagnostics no longer collapse actionable failures into an overly generic `fetch failed` message when a more precise safe classification is available.
Codex wrapper/PATH/smoke-check diagnostics do not report a contradictory repeated state when the npm wrapper is usable.
Port diagnostics distinguish supported reuse from real conflicts and remain actionable.
Planned-port analysis is proactive, component-aware, and included in concise final reporting.
Final summary is deduplicated, truthful, and severity-correct.
Regression coverage exists for root causes fixed by the code change.
Publish flow is completed only after a successful fresh verifier pass.
